overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk-style video game, showing the player character walking through a dimly lit apartment bathroom with neon accents, approaching and entering a shower stall. The environment features holographic signage, vending machines, and futuristic fixtures typical of high-fidelity game engine rendering.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk apartment bathroom with neon-lit sink area

agents.ego_description: walking through the bathroom toward the shower area, passing the sink counter on the left

entered.detail: dark countertop with various toiletries and bottles under cyan neon lighting
red-lit vending machine displaying beverage cans with glowing branding
green glowing arrows projected on the wall indicating directions to shower and toilet
flat screen television mounted on the wall above the doorway
cyan neon strip lights framing the bathroom mirror above the sink

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person view inside a dimly lit cyberpunk apartment bathroom. The camera moves slowly forward past a sink counter with neon lighting on the left and a red vending machine on the right. Ahead, green holographic arrows indicate directions to the shower and toilet areas as the player approaches the doorway.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed shower stall with concrete walls

events.description: passes through the doorway from the main bathroom into the shower stall
interaction prompt appears to take a shower

agents.ego_description: steps into the shower stall and approaches the wall-mounted shower controls

entered.detail: wall-mounted metallic panel with temperature and water flow control knobs
circular metal drain set into the concrete shower floor

segments.scene_description: The camera enters the enclosed shower stall, leaving the main bathroom area behind. The space is darker with concrete walls and floor. The player approaches the shower controls mounted on the wall, and an interaction prompt appears indicating the option to take a shower.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a neon-lit cyberpunk bathroom into the stark, enclosed confines of a shower stall. It begins by gliding forward past a sink counter illuminated by neon lights and a red vending machine, guided by green holographic arrows pointing toward the facilities. As the camera moves through the doorway, the vibrant lighting of the main room fades, shifting the environment into a darker space defined by raw concrete walls and floors. The scene then narrows as the camera enters the shower stall, finally coming to a halt before the wall-mounted controls where an interaction prompt appears.
